description: Collective threats that overwhelm through sheer numbers — writhing, buzzing, and biting masses.
creatures: Swarm of Rats
A writhing carpet of disease-carrying rodents that pours over victims like a living flood.
Swarm of Bats
A shrieking, churning cloud of leathery wings that blinds and panics anything caught inside.
Swarm of Insects
A droning black cloud of biting, crawling bugs that smothers victims and fills every gap.
Swarm of Ravens
A screaming murder of black birds that coordinate attacks and peck at eyes.
Locust Swarm
A sky-darkening plague of ravenous insects that strips fields bare in minutes.
Spider Swarm
A skittering carpet of tiny, venomous spiders that covers victims and bites hundreds of times.
Bee Swarm
An angry, humming mass of stinging bees that pursues intruders with single-minded fury.
Army Ants
A relentless column of soldier ants that strips flesh from bone and devours everything in its path.
Piranha School
A churning frenzy of razor-toothed fish that reduces a body to bare skeleton in seconds.
Fairy Swarm
A glittering cloud of tiny fey whose collective magic bewilders, charms, and disorients all at once.
